sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 468 — Thrace, Thasos. ca. 525-463 BC. Silver Diobol (0.9g), 11 mm. Naked ithyphallic satyr in kneeling running attitude carrying in his arms a struggling numph r. Reverse;  Quadripartite incuse square. The
sales.description:
Thrace, Thasos. ca. 525-463 BC. Silver Diobol (0.9g), 11 mm. Naked ithyphallic satyr in kneeling running attitude carrying in his arms a struggling numph r. Reverse;  Quadripartite incuse square. The "shemkel" is enormous! A rarely seen denomination and very well defined! S-1359 (obol). NGC graded Choice Very Fine; Strike: 5/5, Surface: 5/5.  Lightly toned.  Estimated Value $350 - UP
Ex Peter Preovolos Collection....
